Huda Mansour is a Web and Graphics Designer with contact information including email, phone number, GitHub, LinkedIn, and a personal website.

Huda Mansour obtained a Bachelor of Engineering in Information Technology from Nagpur University in September 2015, after completing her Higher Secondary Certificate from the State Board of Secondary Education in May 2011 and Secondary School Certificate from the Maharashtra State Board of Secondary Education in June 2009.

From January 2017 to December 2018, Huda Mansour worked as a Web and Graphics Designer at Virtuous Media Point in Pune, India, where she designed and developed responsive websites and created graphic designs.
A Shopping Management System was developed using C++ as a mini project between January 2013 and May 2013, offering improved suggestions for health problems.
A paper was presented at the national level event TECH-WAVE 2015, held at S.R.M.C.E., Nagpur, India.
Participation in the Innovesta 2015 project competition at Priyadarshini Indira Gandhi College of Engineering, Nagpur, India, was recognized as an award and honor.

The individual possesses basic skills in programming languages C and Java, and web technologies including HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and jQuery. They also have experience with MySQL 5.0 database and IDEs like Sublime Text and Notepad.
The individual is proficient in operating systems Windows XP and Windows 7, and has graphic design skills in Corel Draw, Adobe Photoshop, and Adobe Illustrator.
The individual served as a coordinator for project competitions at FACE-IT, Nagpur University from 2013 to 2014, organizing and managing these competitions.

From January 2014 to December 2014, Huda Mansour was a Web Designing and Development Intern at e-sense IT Solution pvt. ltd. in Nagpur, India, where she designed website solutions, gathered requirements, and participated in the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC).

Huda Mansour developed several client websites, including www.nitka.com, Nagpur United Corporation (admin), Mintmetrix.com, Tagline Videos (admin), and Smartbadge (admin), utilizing HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and jQuery with Sublime Text.
Huda Mansour contributed to websites such as www.shreekiaspack.co.in, www.3staragroproducts.com, and www.luckystationery.co.in, applying HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, and JavaScript with Notepad++.
Huda Mansour designed various logos, brochures, advertising banners, visiting cards, pamphlets, and hoardings for clients.
From September 2014 to September 2015, Huda Mansour developed a web-based disease diagnosis expert system as a major project for her Bachelor of Engineering final year.

JavaScript, a versatile and energetic language, is the driving force behind interactive experiences on the web. Though comfortable in the company of established languages like C and Java, and often seen paired with the structural foundations of HTML5 and CSS3, JavaScript truly shines when bringing dynamism to the digital world. It’s a collaborative spirit, frequently working hand-in-hand with the streamlining efficiency of jQuery and the responsive framework of Bootstrap. 

Consider it the architect of engaging front-ends, capable of building everything from simple animations to complex web applications. Huda Mansour, a web and graphics designer, clearly understands this potential, having wielded JavaScript – alongside its companions – to craft responsive websites for clients like nitka.com and Nagpur United Corporation. 

Mansour’s experience demonstrates JavaScript’s practical application; it’s not merely a theoretical construct, but a tool honed through real-world projects. From the polished designs of Virtuous Media Point to the foundational work during her internship at e-sense IT Solution, JavaScript has been instrumental in bringing website solutions to life. Whether utilizing the sophisticated environment of Sublime Text or the streamlined simplicity of Notepad++, JavaScript consistently proves its adaptability. It’s a key component in Mansour’s portfolio, evident in contributions to sites like shreekiaspack.co.in and luckystationery.co.in, where it adds a layer of interactivity and polish. 

JavaScript isn’t just a language; it’s a facilitator, a builder, and a vital ingredient in the modern web experience.

Huda Mansour is a driven and versatile Web and Graphics Designer, readily connecting with clients and collaborators through her online presence – find her at hudamansour.com, on LinkedIn, and GitHub. Her foundation is a Bachelor of Engineering in Information Technology from Nagpur University, earned after a consistent academic record beginning with her secondary education in Maharashtra. 

Huda isn’t simply a designer; she’s a builder. Her professional journey began with an internship at e-sense IT Solution, where she cut her teeth on the full software development lifecycle, gathering requirements and crafting website solutions. This experience blossomed into a two-year role at Virtuous Media Point, where she honed her skills in designing and developing responsive websites, bringing digital visions to life. 

Fluent in the languages of the web – HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and jQuery – she’s equally comfortable with Sublime Text and Notepad++. Her portfolio speaks for itself, showcasing a diverse range of projects from complete website development for clients like nitka.com and Mintmetrix.com, to contributions to sites like shreekiaspack.co.in and 3staragroproducts.com. Beyond the web, Huda’s creative talents extend to visual branding, crafting logos, brochures, advertising banners, and all manner of marketing collateral. 

Even during her studies, Huda demonstrated initiative, developing a web-based disease diagnosis expert system as her final year engineering project – a testament to her problem-solving abilities and dedication to applying technology to real-world challenges. She approaches her work with a blend of technical expertise and artistic flair, making her a valuable asset to any project.

Nagpur is a city pulsing with academic ambition, a hub for technological training within India. It’s a place where futures are forged in institutions like Nagpur University, a stepping stone for bright minds such as Huda Mansour, who emerged in 2015 with a Bachelor of Engineering in Information Technology. The city fosters innovation, evidenced by events like TECH-WAVE 2015 hosted at S.R.M.C.E., and the competitive spirit of projects showcased at Priyadarshini Indira Gandhi College of Engineering – both institutions firmly rooted within Nagpur’s landscape. 

Beyond the classroom, Nagpur provides practical experience. Companies like e-sense IT Solution pvt. ltd. offer opportunities for aspiring developers, as demonstrated by Mansour’s 2014 internship, where she honed skills in web design and the intricacies of the software development lifecycle. Nagpur isn’t merely a location; it’s a breeding ground for talent, a city that nurtures potential from secondary education through to professional application, and a key node in India’s growing tech sector.

India is a land where ambition takes root and blossoms, a backdrop for journeys of learning and professional growth. It’s a nation woven with educational institutions like Nagpur University, where Huda Mansour forged her foundation in Information Technology, earning a Bachelor of Engineering in 2015 – a testament to years of dedication beginning with her schooling through the Maharashtra State Board. 

India provides the stage for showcasing talent; the national TECH-WAVE 2015 event in Nagpur offered a platform for innovative ideas, while the Innovesta 2015 competition at Priyadarshini Indira Gandhi College of Engineering, also in Nagpur, recognized promising endeavors. 

The country’s burgeoning tech sector offers opportunities for young professionals like Huda Mansour. From 2017 to 2018, she honed her skills at Virtuous Media Point in Pune, crafting responsive websites and compelling graphic designs. Before that, an internship at e-sense IT Solution pvt. ltd. in Nagpur provided invaluable experience in the full spectrum of web development, from requirement gathering to SDLC participation. 

India, therefore, isn’t merely a geographical location, but a dynamic ecosystem – a place where education, innovation, and professional experience converge, shaping the careers of individuals and driving the nation’s technological advancement. Cities like Nagpur and Pune serve as vibrant hubs within this larger landscape, fostering growth and opportunity.

CSS3 is a versatile styling language, a core component in Huda Mansour’s toolkit for bringing web visions to life. Not merely a technical skill, it’s the brush with which she paints interactive and responsive digital experiences. Alongside companions like HTML5, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and jQuery, CSS3 allows her to sculpt the visual layer of websites – from the elegant simplicity of Shreekiaspack.co.in to the dynamic interfaces of client projects like Smartbadge and Mintmetrix.com. 

Her proficiency isn’t theoretical; it’s forged through practical application. From her internship at e-sense IT Solution, participating in the full SDLC, to her role at Virtuous Media Point designing and developing complete websites, CSS3 has been instrumental in delivering functional and aesthetically pleasing results. Whether wielding the power of Sublime Text or the simplicity of Notepad++, CSS3 is consistently employed to craft websites like www.nitka.com, Nagpur United Corporation, and Tagline Videos, demonstrating a consistent ability to translate client needs into polished online realities. It’s a foundational element of her web design and development expertise, enabling her to build sites that are not only visually appealing but also adapt seamlessly to different devices.

Huda Mansour is a practiced web designer and developer, fluent in the visual language of the internet. She builds with a solid foundation in core technologies – HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and jQuery – but truly shines when leveraging the responsive framework of Bootstrap. Her toolkit isn’t limited to code; she’s equally comfortable crafting graphic designs, bringing a holistic approach to web projects. 

From 2014, beginning with an internship at e-sense IT Solution, she quickly moved into a role at Virtuous Media Point (2017-2018), where she honed her skills designing and developing fully responsive websites. She’s not merely a coder, but a builder of online presence, evidenced by her direct contributions to sites like nitka.com, and administrative access to Nagpur United Corporation, Mintmetrix.com, Tagline Videos, and Smartbadge. Her work extends to Shreekiaspack.co.in, 3staragroproducts.com, and Luckystationery.co.in, demonstrating a consistent application of her skills across diverse client needs. While comfortable with both Sublime Text and Notepad++, she’s a pragmatic developer, adapting to the tools at hand to deliver functional and visually appealing web solutions. She understands the entire process, from initial requirement gathering and participation in the SDLC to the final, polished product.

HTML5 is a foundational technology, a versatile building block in the hands of a digital artisan like Huda Mansour. It’s not merely code, but the skeleton upon which responsive, modern websites are constructed. Mansour wields it with practiced ease, alongside companions like CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and jQuery, breathing life into static designs. Her portfolio – a collection of client sites including nitka.com, Nagpur United Corporation, Mintmetrix.com, Tagline Videos, and Smartbadge – stands as testament to its power, each site a uniquely tailored expression built upon this core technology. 

From her early internship at e-sense IT Solution, participating in the full arc of the Software Development Life Cycle, to her role as a Web and Graphics Designer at Virtuous Media Point, HTML5 has been a constant in Mansour’s toolkit. Whether crafting complete website solutions or contributing to established platforms like shreekiaspack.co.in, 3staragroproducts.com, and luckystationery.co.in, it’s the reliable framework she returns to, shaping digital experiences with precision and adaptability. It’s a technology she commands, utilizing both the streamlined efficiency of Sublime Text and the straightforward functionality of Notepad++, proving its flexibility in the hands of a skilled developer.
